name: Chord Energy Corp
business: Chord Energy Corporation is an independent exploration and production company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of crude oil, NGL and natural gas primarily in the Williston Basin. The company sells its production to refiners, marketers and other purchasers.

exposures.sentence: Chord Energy Corporation, a Delaware Corporation (together with our consolidated subsidiaries, the Company, Chord, we, us, or our ), is an independent exploration and production ( E&P ) company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of crude oil, NGL and natural gas primarily in the Williston Basin with limited non-operated interests in the Marcellus Shale.
The Audit and Reserves Committee of our Board of Directors reviews our cybersecurity guidelines and policies and receives updates on cybersecurity matters at least semi-annually.

catalysts.event: Completion of Williston Basin acquisition from XTO Energy Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On October 31, 2025, we completed the 2025 Williston Basin Acquisition for total cash consideration of $542.2 million, including a cash deposit of $55.0 million to XTO upon execution of the purchase and sale agreement and $487.2 million paid to XTO at closing (including customary preliminary purchase price adjustments).

catalysts.event: Board authorization of new share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, our Board of Directors authorized a new share repurchase program covering up to $1.0 billion of common stock, which replaced the existing $750 million share repurchase program.

catalysts.event: Planned TIL of 135 to 165 gross operated wells in 2026
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we plan to TIL approximately 135 to 165 gross operated wells with an average working interest of approximately 75%.

catalysts.event: Expected operated rig count of four to five during majority of 2026
catalysts.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we had four operated rigs running, and we expect to run four to five operated rigs during the majority of 2026.
